reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.9.6: nicer save-to-library and sell-as-NFT flows for the raster canvas. Saving to the library now shows a proper dialog with a list of libraries to pick from and an auto-generated asset name (no typing required), plus a preview thumbnail. Selling as NFT opens a dedicated window with the preview, title, multi-line description, and price fields together, replacing the minimal chained prompts.
